entry.title: New: CR 25-14 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 36 (2025), to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget, Appendix A, Part II, Special Purpose Revenues - Schedule of Revolving/Special Funds for Fiscal Year 2025, Managed Retreat Revolving Fund to add a new condition 3 to require up to $100,000 to be used for the removal of structures, tree stumps, and other debris impacted by shoreline erosion at Baldwin Beach Park.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
